_comment: SLICE_S0_CONTRACT.md §2, L21 residency lint. A table name matching any pattern here must carry region + lawful_basis columns unless explicitly allowlisted with a stated reason. First real consumer is S1; seeded now so the gate predates the first feature store (B2 logic). age_attestation/birthdate/minor patterns added per SECURITY_REVIEW_S0.md minor F5 — age/birthdate/minor-purge tables are the central minor-protection datum and must not escape L21 residency by naming.
